summary: Test suite covers all main requirements: parsing JUnit/JSON, aggregation, totals, flaky detection, and markdown output. Workflow integration tests (Workflow.Tests.ps1) run through act as required, with three well-designed scenarios (A: all-passing, B: flaky detection, C: mixed formats). Unit tests (TestResultsAggregator.Tests.ps1) are copied to the act container and run by the pester job, providing thorough error case coverage. Strengths: excellent test organization with helper functions (Initialize-TempRepo, Invoke-ActCase), clear fixtures and contexts, exact value assertions (AGG_TOTAL=4, specific test names in markdown), good cleanup. Gaps: act-result.txt creation is conditional on act availability (violates "MUST exist" requirement if tests skip); error scenarios through the workflow layer not explicitly tested (malformed fixtures, empty directory, aggregator failures); -AllowFailures flag untested through workflow; output file creation not verified (only stdout checked); indirect validation of unit test results (relies on overall exit code rather than parsing Pester output explicitly). Would catch regressions in main happy path but might miss edge cases and error handling paths.
